provenance: SP-5c Phase 6 calibrated flip (2026-07-02). d_h=4, d_v=2 measured on Phoenix NPU1 via the free-flood R3b perf-counter instrument (Delta_wall-free hardware interval), N=20 drift gate range-0, fit_residual ~7e-15 byte-identical. intra core=0/mem=2 is the add_one +2/+4/-2 intra-tile signature (mem_off-core_off=+2, HW-observed); absolute intra is gauge-fixed (core=0), only the contrast is observable. Units: raw counter cycles == trace cycles (both tile-clock). HONEST FIRST CALIBRATION: end-to-end causal-vs-HW validation is coarse, bounded by the open SP-4a cold-start fill-state Delta_wall gap (~7-50cy > the ~2cy skew) -- the constants are correct by measurement (clean R3b) but tight HW confirmation waits until that gap closes. Reversible (this flag).
per_channel: d_h/d_v fitted channel-agnostic on a ch15(START)/ch14(STOP) blend; ch15-in-isolation is structurally unmeasurable (Seam 1), disclosed-assumed uniform.
